channel.title: Computer Vision on Aneesh Mokashi
channel.description: Recent content in Computer Vision on Aneesh Mokashi

item.title: ResNet-34 Custom Implementation for CIFAR-10
item.author: aneeshkmokashi@gmail.com (Aneesh Mokashi)
item.description: Lightweight ResNet-34 variant optimized for CIFAR-10 image classification and resource-constrained deployment
